info.name: Microsoft 365 Calendar Integration
info.summary: MS365 attendee search and free/busy for Nextcloud Calendar
info.description:
This app integrates Microsoft 365 users into the Nextcloud Calendar.
**Features:** - Search Microsoft 365 users as attendees in the Calendar app - View free/busy information from Microsoft 365 calendars - OAuth2 authentication with Microsoft Entra ID (PKCE)
info.author: SaenDET
